title: Loguetown Pulls the Crew Apart
description: On pages 17–19, loguetown pulls the crew apart focuses on Zoro, Tashigi, Nami, Luffy as the crew reaches Loguetown, where Zoro searches for swords and runs into Tashigi.
scene: On pages 17–19, loguetown pulls the crew apart focuses on Zoro, Tashigi, Nami, Luffy as the crew reaches Loguetown, where Zoro searches for swords and runs into Tashigi.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I feel much better when I have 3 swords.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'd never have imagined a cheapskate like you would just willingly give away the family heirloom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Just what's wrong with a man entrusting his dream to another man!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Alright, just get to cleaning the bathtub.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I can't even stand up after that...

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: seargent major tashigi has gone to pick up her sword at the arms shop, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Just how many hours does she need to do that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We've got an eyewitness report about Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: She's the shame of the Marine Headquarters...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: – Memo - There were originally 2, but Lufby broke 1 of them.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: - Ventilation Shaft (connects to rear of the ship)

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: The shower and bath use drawn and purified sea water that is heated over fire.

summary: This part gives Zoro a major equipment and character moment while Loguetown’s Marines begin to matter.
